plugins.name: todo
plugins.description: Task todo list: the agent keeps a live checklist for multi-step work and shows it to you as it goes.
plugins.author: Orca

plugins.name: mem0
plugins.description: Long-term memory backed by a self-hosted mem0 server: the brain can save durable facts and recall them across conversations.
plugins.author: Orca

plugins.name: image-gen
plugins.description: Image generation via the OpenAI Images API (gpt-image-1 by default). Generated images show directly in the chat.
plugins.author: Orca

plugins.name: image-edit
plugins.description: Edit an existing image from a text instruction (image-to-image) via the OpenAI Images edits API. The result shows in the chat.
plugins.author: Orca

plugins.name: web
plugins.description: Web research: web_search (Tavily) and web_fetch (fetch a page as readable text).
plugins.author: Orca
